label: DCM-Harvest
info:
Backend flows for Harvest Catalogue feature.

MongoDB collections:
  h_harvest_runs  – harvest run records (config, status, results, embedded logs + provenance)
  lc_assets       – local catalogue assets (written during harvest, owned by DCM-LocalCatalogue)
  cr_catalogues   – read-only (source catalogue data)

All responses are sent back to the Dashboard via link-out → dashboard-linkin (1320340df737c22e).

name: response — flatten catalog data
Start Harvest — build run + lc_assets
response — startHarvest
response — strip embedded arrays for list
Get Harvest Run Detail
response
response — extract logs from runs
response — extract provenance from runs
Pause Harvest
Resume Harvest
Cancel Harvest
response
